ns0:entry.ns0:title: NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
Language: java
𝑫𝒆𝒗𝑶𝒑𝒔 𝑹𝒆𝒂𝒍 𝑾𝒐𝒓𝒍𝒅 𝑷𝒓𝒐𝒋𝒆𝒄𝒕𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝑨𝒔𝒑𝒊𝒓𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝑫𝒆𝒗𝑶𝒑𝒔 𝑬𝒏𝒈𝒊𝒏𝒆𝒆𝒓𝒔 [𝑩𝒆𝒈𝒊𝒏𝒏𝒆𝒓 𝒕𝒐 𝑨𝒅𝒗𝒂𝒏𝒄𝒆𝒅]

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krahets/hello-algo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/krahets/hello-algo
Language: java
《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain4j/langchain4j
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j
Language: java
LangChain4j is an open-source Java library that simplifies the integration of LLMs into Java applications through a unified API, providing access to popular LLMs and vector databases. It makes implementing RAG, tool calling (including support for MCP), and agents easy. LangChain4j integrates seamlessly with various enterprise Java frameworks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openrewrite/rewrite
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite
Language: java
Automated mass refactoring of source code.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml
Language: java
Generate diagrams from textual description

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trinodb/trino
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trinodb/trino
Language: java
Official repository of Trino, the distributed SQL query engine for big data, formerly known as PrestoSQL (https://trino.io)
